tools.name: log_incident
tools.description: Log a new ICT-related incident. First step in the DORA incident management process (Art. 17).

tools.name: classify_incident
tools.description: Classify an incident against the 6 DORA criteria (RTS 2024/1772). Determines if MAJOR (triggers 4h/72h/1m reporting) or NON-MAJOR.

tools.name: major_incident_check
tools.description: Quick check: would these criteria values classify as a MAJOR incident? No incident record needed — use for pre-assessment.

tools.name: initial_notification
tools.description: Generate the 4h initial notification for a MAJOR incident (ITS 2025/302 Annex I). Must be submitted within 4h of classification, max 24h after detection.

tools.name: intermediate_report
tools.description: Generate the 72h intermediate report for a MAJOR incident (ITS 2025/302). Must include action plan if incident is not yet resolved.

tools.name: final_report
tools.description: Generate the 1-month final report with root cause analysis and lessons learned.

tools.name: deadline_tracker
tools.description: Track all active MAJOR incident reporting deadlines. Shows overdue and upcoming.

tools.name: reclassify
tools.description: Reclassify an incident (MAJOR to NON-MAJOR or vice versa). Competent authority must be notified of reclassification.

tools.name: incident_stats
tools.description: Dashboard: total/open/major incidents, overdue deadlines, by severity/status.

tools.name: cyber_threat_notify
tools.description: Voluntary notification of a significant cyber threat (Art. 19(2)). Uses ITS 2025/302 Annex III template.

tools.name: incident_log
tools.description: Full incident register with filters (status, classification, severity, search).
